data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_EnergyGuru1:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pSLATEPORT's most popular kind of guy,
the ENERGY GURU, is in the news again!\pHe promises to, “Stupendously go for
it in just this many days: {STR_VAR_1}!”\pWhile he refused to elaborate on what
he will stupendously go for, the\lENERGY GURU advised, “Save up your\lmoney. That'll be good...”\pIt sounds like a trip to SLATEPORT
would be well worth your while that day.\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_EnergyGuru2:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pSLATEPORT'S ENERGY GURU is going
for it stupendously in the MARKET!\pHe promises unbeatable bargain
prices on CALCIUM and PROTEIN!\pA trip to SLATEPORT CITY sounds
worthwhile. Why not visit and shop\lto your heart's content?\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_EnergyGuru3:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pSLATEPORT'S ENERGY GURU is going
for it stupendously in the MARKET!\pHe promises unbeatable bargain
prices on CALCIUM and PROTEIN!\pAccording to the ENERGY GURU, he
still has ample merchandise left.\pWhy not visit SLATEPORT CITY for
a most enjoyable shopping trip?\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_GameCorner1:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pIt's approaching!
It's finally coming!\pThe GAME CORNER's service day will be
here in just this many days: {STR_VAR_1}!\pEven those who are usually unlucky
may be lucky on this particular day!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_GameCorner2:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pIt's here!
It's finally arrived!\pGAME CORNER's service day has finally
arrived!\pCould you be lucky at the SLOTS 
and ROULETTE?\pThe location is MAUVILLE CITY.
This is the place!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_GameCorner3:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pIt's here!
It's finally arrived!\pGAME CORNER's service day has finally
arrived!\pCould you be lucky at the SLOTS
and ROULETTE?\pTime is limited and has almost run out.
The location is MAUVILLE CITY.\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_LilycoveDepartment1:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pWe've just received wonderful news
from LILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE.\pThe DEPARTMENT STORE's clear-out sale
will be in just this many days: {STR_VAR_1}!\pThat thingamajig or that doodad that
you've always wanted could be yours!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_LilycoveDepartment2:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pLILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE's clear-out
sale has finally arrived!\pAll the thingamajigs and doodads that
you've always dreamt about...\pYou may be in for fateful encounters
with them all!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_LilycoveDepartment3:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pLILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE's clear-out
sale has finally arrived!\pAll the thingamajigs and doodads that
you've always dreamt about...\pYou may be in for fateful encounters
with them all!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_DevonCorporation: This program has been brought to you\nby the DEVON CORPORATION.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_Contests: What's important is love for POKéMON.\pWhat you need is a little courage.\pLet your cherished POKéMON take\ncenter stage! POKéMON CONTESTS!
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_DayCare: We raise your beloved POKéMON with\nall of our love!\pFor all your POKéMON-training needs,\nvisit our DAY CARE on ROUTE 117.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_LavaridgeSpa: The cauldron of good times and laughs!\nLAVARIDGE SPA.
data_text_pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_LilycoveDepartment:
Overflowing with great merchandise
and excitement!\pA great place to find that something
you need!\pVisit LILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE for
all your shopping needs!
